prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! The task may seem daunting, but you have the skills and determination to see it through. Break it down into smaller steps if it feels overwhelming. Focus on the satisfaction you'll feel once it's accomplished. Don't let procrastination hold you back any longer. Step up, dig in, and do your best. You'll be proud of yourself once it's done. It's time to make that progress you've been delaying. Get out of your own head and just start. You're stronger than you think. Get it done!
